name: Load Brain Context on Prompt
description: Before every prompt, remind Kiro to read the canonical brain files so it always resumes from the correct state without manual instruction.

then.prompt:
Before answering, read these files in order if you have not already done so this session:
1. .brain/NextSteps.md
2. .brain/Progress.md
3. .brain/ExamTracker.md
4. MSTC/README.md
5. MSTC/INTERVIEW-PLAN.md

Confirm the active phase against today's date, then proceed with the user's request.
